title: Policy: Policy applied - Turn off WiFi
scenario: Policy-locked settings remain locked and show offline modification pop-up after app restart when Wi-Fi is turned off
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings.
3. Ensure that Policies have been applied to the connected Poly Bluetooth audio device (e.g., via MDM or Poly Lens).
4. Turn off Wi-Fi on the Android device.
5. Force close and restart the Poly Studio Mobile app.
6. Reopen the app and navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings.
7. Attempt to modify a setting that is locked by the applied Policy (e.g., ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer, or Audio Settings).
expected: The locked setting should remain grayed out / non-editable. Attempting to modify it should display a pop-up message indicating that the setting cannot be modified offline.
